title: Claude Custom Connector Explained  | Connect Your Own APIs & Apps
summary: Claude's custom connector feature enables users to integrate Claude directly with their own APIs, databases, and internal tools beyond pre-built connectors. The video explains setup requirements including authentication and demonstrates real-world applications in analytics, e-commerce, and internal tooling.
